title: The Inner Circle
description: Modpack for The Inner Circle Discord community.
body:
Embark on a unique and immersive Minecraft journey with "The Inner Circle Edition" modpack, specially curated for a casual community. Designed around optimization mods, this pack gives a customizable Vanilla+ experience while modernizing the gameplay and visuals.

This modpack was designed for a specific Discord community of adults looking for quality of life and multiplayer upgrades after over a decade of vanilla Minecraft. Any player looking for a less time consuming version of Minecraft that remains near vanilla: look no further.

The digital map and player trade system add fun new features; while the inventory management, organization upgrades, and UI customization options are meant to provide a more comfortable vanilla experience while retaining the core difficulties of Minecraft's survival mode. Nothing is made too easy, but you can say goodbye to a number of minor annoyances! 

Also includes a multitude of performance and framework mods. Uses Iris instead of Optifine, no additional manual downloads needed.
